ddls:
CREATE TABLE "game_objects" (
  "object_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game object */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game object (e.g., Obj_arg0, Obj_arg1) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the game object (e.g., Integer, Float, Boolean) */,
  "games" TEXT /* Games that the object is used in (e.g., Both) */,
  "required" INTEGER /* Whether the object is required or not */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game object */,
  "values" TEXT /* Possible values for the game object */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /*  Specifies the game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) where the object is used. */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /*  Specifies the difficulty level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) where the object is used. */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the object was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the object is currently active and can be used in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("object_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_levels" (
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game level */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the game level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game level */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Specifies the game mode (e.g., single-player, multi-player) */,
  "difficulty_level" TEXT /* Specifies the difficulty level (e.g., easy, medium, hard) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the level was last updated */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the level is currently active and can be used in the game */,
  "game_objects" TEXT /* JSON array of game objects used in the level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_progress" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "level_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing game_levels.level_id */,
  "progress" REAL /* Player's progress in the level (e.g., percentage completed) */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Player's score in the level */,
  "time_played" INTEGER /* Time (in seconds) the player has spent on the level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the progress record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, designer, tester) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON array of permissions for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing users.user_id */,
  "login_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged in */,
  "logout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user logged out */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user during the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)
